wolfram._note: Unofficial Wolfram MCP (sw1sh/WolframMCP). Replace PATH_TO_WOLFRAM_MCP with your install path. See README for setup.

arxiv._note: arXiv MCP server (blazickjp/arxiv-mcp-server). Install: uvx arxiv-mcp-server

arxiv-latex-mcp._note: arXiv LaTeX MCP (takashiishida/arxiv-latex-mcp). Install: uvx arxiv-latex-mcp
